analysis: Seven nights, all between 6h 54m and 7h 56m — you are consistent in a way that is genuinely impressive, and that 7h 56m on the 8th is your best of the stretch by a stretch. REM has been quietly excellent, hitting 2 hours or more twice and barely dipping below 1h 38m, which tells me the wind-down stack is doing something real. The thing worth watching is deep sleep — it peaked at 53 minutes on the 6th and has been sliding since, sitting at just 26 minutes last night, which is the lowest of the whole run. Awake time has also been a bit spiky, especially that 1h 17m on the 10th, so there's still something disturbing the middle of the night that your hot-cold shower and lavender haven't fully cracked yet — but honestly, the overall picture is a body that's learning to rest, and that counts.
